title: Mechanical Project Manager
description_raw:
Rullion are recruiting a Mechanical Project Manager for a 6-month outside-IR35 contract in Manchester. The role oversees the delivery of HVAC and mechanical plant upgrades at a large commercial office development.

Key responsibilities:
- Manage the project plan, risk register, and milestone schedule
- Coordinate mechanical subcontractors and M&E consultants
- Stakeholder management across the client, principal contractor, and building services design team
- Administer NEC4 ECC contracts

Requirements:
- 5+ years mechanical project management experience
- HVAC or M&E building services background
- PRINCE2 or APM PMQ

Rate: £575–£625 per day outside IR35
Duration: 6 months
Start: 1 August 2026
Location: Manchester, UK (office-based)
